subject: EPU - TIFF vs TIF
body:
Dear Dimitri,

 

I am wondering if someone is using WARP with the new version of EPU which
support the K3 camera.

EPU is saving compressed non-corrected frames with the extension .tiff (two
ts). If I manually change the file extension to .tif (single t), WARP
works as usual with SerialEM.

I am using staker2 to copy files from the original folder to the WARP
computer. 

Do you have a solution different to make a home-made script to change the
file extension of the movies?

 

Saludos,

Julio

 

Dr. Julio Ortiz

Forschungszentrum Jülich GmbH

Ernst Ruska-Centrum für Mikroskopie und Spektroskopie mit Elektronen

ER-C-3: Strukturbiologie

52425 Jülich

Germany

Phone (office): +49 2461 61-2032

Phone (Microscope- Arctica): +49 2461 61- 85521

Fax:       +49 2461 61-1448

EMAIL:  <mailto:j.ortiz@fz-juelich.de> j.ortiz@fz-juelich.de
